name: Razorpay Secrets — HashiCorp Vault Integration
scenario: Razorpay has 50 services each using the same static DB password stored in application.yml (committed to git). Migrate to Vault with dynamic DB credentials and KV secrets for API keys.

core.description: bootstrap.yml: Vault config (uri, KUBERNETES auth, kv enabled, database enabled). Comments explaining each field.
VaultSecretService @Service: @Value for visa_api_key and webhook_secret (with test defaults). hasSecrets() and maskedKey() methods.
SecretAuditService @Service: logAccess(path, operation) — logs path+time but NEVER the value. @Scheduled Vault health check every 30s.
Vault policy HCL file: read for secret/data/payment-service, read for database/creds/payment-service-db, sys/leases/renew update. Implicit deny all else.
@SpringBootTest (3 tests): @Value injected, audit log never contains secret value, fallback activates when VaultTemplate throws. All 3 pass.
README: explains dynamic secrets vs static passwords: TTL, blast radius, audit trail.

bonus.description: VaultTemplate: getMerchantSecret(merchantId) reading dynamic path. Fallback returns default Map when Vault unavailable.
ESO YAML: ClusterSecretStore + ExternalSecret syncing Vault path to k8s Secret with 1h refresh.
SecretRotationService: triggerRotation(path) via VaultTemplate, logs rotation event. Test: rotation count increments.

ai_policy_explanation: 5 hints. bootstrap.yml: Spring Cloud Vault config must be in bootstrap.yml (processed before application.yml). If using Spring Boot 2.4+: use spring.config.import=vault:// in application.yml instead. KUBERNETES auth: pod's ServiceAccount token (auto-mounted at /var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token) authenticates to Vault — no static credential needed. @Value with default: ${payment.visa.api-key:test-default} — safe for @SpringBootTest without real Vault. VaultTemplate in @SpringBootTest: will throw exception (no real Vault running) — use try-catch or @MockBean. Audit log security test: assert that the log entries do NOT contain actual secret values.
